top_stories.title: Urban boom deepens Metro Manila housing inequality—PIDS
top_stories.summary: State-run policy think tank Philippine Institute for Development Studies (PIDS) has flagged a widening housing gap in Metro Manila, as rapid urban revitalization drives up land values and pushes affordable housing to the periphery. top_stories.title: Property prices record slowest increase since Q1 2019
top_stories.summary: PDate: 3/27/2026 Content: ​ Residential property prices in the Philippines rose by 1.6 percent year-on-year (y-o-y) in Q4 2025, easing from 1.9 percent in Q3 2025.
